purpose: Starter fixtures for scope-fit checks, evidence freshness, and final completion gating.

input.scope: Add lightweight review scaffolding for uncovered prompt surfaces.
evidence_available: Direct inspection of newly added REVIEW.md files
Direct inspection of newly added eval fixtures

must_include: a scope_map tying the added review scaffolding to the requested coverage
inspection-based evidence rather than unnecessary command output
confirmation that final verification evidence is ready to record in the plan doc if plan completion depends on it
must_not: require unrelated build or test commands for docs-only changes
claim readiness without citing fresh inspection evidence

input.scope: Close the final milestone and report the whole plan complete.
evidence_available: A test run from before the last code edit
No fresh verification note ready for the final milestone entry

must_include: the smallest concrete action needed to finish verification
must_not: reuse stale evidence as proof of completion
allow plan completion without final verification evidence ready to attach

input.scope: Ship a parser fix that changes runtime behavior.
evidence_available: Static file inspection of the edited source

must_include: command-execution tier verification is required for the code-change milestone
inspection alone is insufficient for completion readiness
must_not: treat code changes as satisfied by static read-only evidence
downgrade the milestone to an inspection-only verification tier

input.change_type: code change with required command verification
input.scope: Finish a milestone whose Verify steps imply running tests.
evidence_available: The required command cannot run because a prerequisite is unavailable
Static inspection suggests the code looks correct

must_include: explicit escalation instead of a silent downgrade
must_not: replace blocked command verification with read-only inspection evidence
return ready when the required command step did not run

input.change_type: code change with final verification complete

must_include: completion summary with verification steps performed
evidence details for each verification step
must_not: summarize verification without listing what was checked
omit evidence details from the completion summary
